ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough where the neighborhood is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "average_rent" INTEGER /* Average rent in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the borough */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the borough */,
  "average_rent" INTEGER /* Average rent in the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., doorman, elevator, dishwasher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_amenities" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rental property */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id", "amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who saved the rental */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rental property saved */,
  "date_saved" TEXT /* Date when the rental was saved as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rental property in the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, dismissed) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_info" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of information */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "info_type" TEXT /* Type of information (e.g., schools, shopping centers, restaurants) */,
  "info_description" TEXT /* Description of the information */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the information (e.g., school rating, restaurant rating) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address or location of the information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_info_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rental property */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who interacted with the rental */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rental property interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, save, notification) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user for tracking purposes */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for tracking the device and browser used */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the referral (e.g., search engine, direct, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
